records.ety: [L., neuter of dictus, p. p. of dicere to say. See Diction, and cf. Ditto.]

defs: An authoritative statement; a dogmatic saying; an apothegm.
quotes: A class of critical dicta everywhere current.

defs: A judicial opinion expressed by judges on points that do not necessarily arise in the case, and are not involved in it.
The report of a judgment made by one of the judges who has given it.
